key.name: base-url
key.description: The base URL of your Jira instance (e.g. https://jira.example.com)

key.name: token
key.description: Jira Personal Access Token used for Bearer authentication

key.name: jql
key.default: 'assignee = currentUser() AND resolution = Unresolved ORDER BY updated DESC'
key.description: JQL query used to fetch issues

key.name: max-results
key.description: Maximum number of issues to fetch per refresh

key.name: verify-ssl
key.description: Whether to verify the server's SSL certificate. Disable only for self-signed certificates.
